label: About
title: About Blue Novice Listening Shrine
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 20 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Sacrificial Code, by KALI MALONE and Late '90s / Early '00s Japanese Ambient Techno and Electronica Mix【 THE NTS GUIDE TO… 】, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Blue Novice Listening Shrine: Create a centered, symmetrical dusk shrine for a gentle machine novice, composed like a solemn monochrome album cover but tinted in blue-gray, moss, warm amber, and small lacquer-red accents. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large central square slab and black circular disc, upper-left hanging landscape tablet, and upper-right square halo plaque.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
